auth: none (public) — no API keys or passwords needed
prerequisites: Slim SEO plugin must be installed and active
Dukkan plugin must be v1.0.6 or later (the site admin updates this once)
why_two_methods: METHOD 1 (recommended): Use Dukkan's dedicated endpoint. One field per call, no auth, nothing gets overwritten.
METHOD 2 (fallback): Use WooCommerce's native meta_data. Requires sending ALL six fields every time to avoid data loss.

method_1_dukkan_endpoint.description: Preferred. Single-field PUTs — update only the title or only the description. No auth needed. Other SEO fields (images, canonical, noindex) are untouched.

examples.title: curl -X PUT https://fashion.dukkanjo.com/wp-json/dukkan-seo/v1/posts/42737/title       -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"title":"Blue Summer Dress — Buy Online"}'
examples.description: curl -X PUT https://fashion.dukkanjo.com/wp-json/dukkan-seo/v1/posts/42737/description -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"description":"Free shipping over 30 JOD."}'

notes: Works on any post type — products, pages, posts.
POST not supported — use PUT only.
Returns 200 with { id, title } or { id, description }.
Returns 404 if the post ID doesn't exist.
Returns 400 if the request body is missing the required field.

method_2_wc_meta_data.description: Fallback. Uses WooCommerce's native REST API. Must include ALL six Slim SEO fields in every call. Sending only 'title' will erase description, images, canonical, and noindex.
method_2_wc_meta_data.warning: If you omit any field from the value object, it will be set to empty. Always send all six fields.
